name: android-libbacktrace
title: android-libbacktrace
description:
Android backtrace library
Android backtrace library produce symbolic backtraces for making
debugging easier.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-libbacktrace because Android backtrace library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-libbacktrace as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-libbacktrace with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-libbacktrace --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
